calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Apr-26-2004 Assigned To Trial Court

COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Apr-26-2004 Vacated
MINI MINUTES: This Cause came as assigned from the Presiding Judge Master Calendar for Court Trial/Settlement Conference.
Comm. Sue kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Romy Barulich.
Plaintiff: Nasir Patel present in pro per.
Defendants: Lisa Adams and James Saunders present in pro per.
Parties met the with JPT: A. Young in Dept. 207 and reached a settlement by Stipulation for Entry of Judgment or for Dismissal of the action.
Terms of the settlement were read into the record by Comm. Kaplan at parties request, as follows: Judgment against the defendant for possession of the premises of the property located at: 2048 Polk St., room #207, San Francisco and back rent in the amount of $1,500.00. Defendants will make partial payment of $600.00 by 5 p.m. April 26, 2004, $450.00 by 5 p.m. on May 14, 2004 and $450.00 by 5 p.m. May 28, 2004.
Defendants to stay current with the weekly rent of $180.00 due on Monday of each week.
If Defendants comply with all terms, plaintiff to dismissed the action within one week of May 28, 2004.
If the Defendants fail to comply with the terms, Plaintiff shall upon Ex Parte Application and declaration to the Court, with at least 24 hours notice to the Defendants, obtain a Judgment from the presiding judge department.
Defendants to promptly notify the management of electricity outage, Plaintiff to comply with local code regarding on-off time and temp. of heat and give a minimum 24 hours notice for water shut-off, accept in the emergency situation.
Each party waives claim against the other and each waives costs and fees.
All parties agreed to the settlement in open court.
Matter is deemed settled and Trial vacated.
The Court deemed the matter settled and trial date is vacated.
